title: Mandamus proceedings to enforce reinstatement
doc_html:
§405.  Mandamus proceedings to enforce reinstatement

Mandamus proceedings to enforce the provisions of this Part may be instituted in the district court of the residence of the applicant, or in the district court of the location of the principal office of the state unit involved, at the election of the applicant.
doc_text:
§405.  Mandamus proceedings to enforce reinstatement
Mandamus proceedings to enforce the provisions of this Part may be instituted in the district court of the residence of the applicant, or in the district court of the location of the principal office of the state unit involved, at the election of the applicant.
